skills.name: csp-brainstorming
skills.description: Collaborative design partner combining divergent-convergent ideation with interactive design. Use before any creative work.

skills.name: csp-executing-plans
skills.description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

skills.name: csp-finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup

skills.name: csp-receiving-code-review
skills.description: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation

skills.name: csp-requesting-code-review
skills.description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements

skills.name: csp-agent-teams
skills.description: Orchestrate multiple AI agents for parallel or sequential execution. Subagent-driven development + parallel agent dispatch.

skills.name: csp-systematic-debugging
skills.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

skills.name: csp-tdd
skills.description: TDD methodology + workflow + execution agent. Write failing test first, minimal code to pass, then refactor. 80%+ coverage.

skills.name: csp-using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans - ensures an isolated workspace exists via native tools or git worktree fallback

skills.name: csp-verification
skills.description: Verify changes really work before claiming completion. Evidence before assertions. 6-phase verification (build, types, lint, tests, security, diff).

skills.name: csp-writing-plans
skills.description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code

skills.name: csp-writing-skills
skills.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment

skills.name: csp-capture
skills.description: Capture ideas, tasks, notes, and seeds to their destination

skills.name: csp-config
skills.description: Configure CSP settings — workflow toggles, advanced knobs, integrations, and model profile

skills.name: csp-graphify
skills.description: Build, query, and inspect the project knowledge graph in .planning/graphs/

skills.name: csp-ns-context
skills.description: codebase intelligence | map graphify docs learnings

skills.name: csp-ns-ideate
skills.description: exploration capture | explore sketch spike spec capture

skills.name: csp-ns-manage
skills.description: config workspace | workstreams thread update ship inbox

skills.name: csp-ns-project
skills.description: project lifecycle | milestones audits summary

skills.name: csp-ns-review
skills.description: quality gates | code review debug audit security eval ui

skills.name: csp-ns-workflow
skills.description: workflow | discuss plan execute verify phase progress

skills.name: csp-phase
skills.description: CRUD for phases in ROADMAP.md — add, insert, remove, or edit phases

skills.name: csp-resume-work
skills.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration

skills.name: csp-review-backlog
skills.description: Review and promote backlog items to active milestone

skills.name: csp-surface
skills.description: Toggle which skills are surfaced — apply a profile, list, or disable a cluster without reinstall

skills.name: csp-workspace
skills.description: Manage CSP workspaces — create, list, or remove isolated workspace environments

skills.name: csp-workstreams
skills.description: Manage parallel workstreams — list, create, switch, status, progress, complete, and resume

skills.name: csp-advisor-researcher
skills.description: Researches a single gray area decision and returns a structured comparison table with rationale. Spawned by discuss-phase advisor mode.

skills.name: csp-ai-researcher
skills.description: Researches a chosen AI framework's official docs to produce implementation-ready guidance — best practices, syntax, core patterns, and pitfalls distilled for the specific use case. Writes the Framework Quick Reference and Implementation Guidance sections of AI-SPEC.md. Spawned by /csp-ai-integration-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-assumptions-analyzer
skills.description: Deeply analyzes codebase for a phase and returns structured assumptions with evidence. Spawned by discuss-phase assumptions mode.

skills.name: csp-code-fixer
skills.description: Applies fixes to code review findings from REVIEW.md. Reads source files, applies intelligent fixes, and commits each fix atomically. Spawned by /csp-code-review --fix.

skills.name: csp-code-reviewer
skills.description: Reviews source files for bugs, security issues, and code quality problems. Produces structured REVIEW.md with severity-classified findings. Spawned by /csp-code-review.

skills.name: csp-codebase-mapper
skills.description: Explores codebase and writes structured analysis documents. Spawned by map-codebase with a focus area (tech, arch, quality, concerns). Writes documents directly to reduce orchestrator context load.

skills.name: csp-debug-session-manager
skills.description: Manages multi-cycle /csp-debug checkpoint and continuation loop in isolated context. Spawns csp-debugger agents, handles checkpoints via AskUserQuestion, dispatches specialist skills, applies fixes. Returns compact summary to main context. Spawned by /csp-debug command.

skills.name: csp-debugger
skills.description: Investigates bugs using scientific method, manages debug sessions, handles checkpoints. Spawned by /csp-debug orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-doc-classifier
skills.description: Classifies a single planning document as ADR, PRD, SPEC, DOC, or UNKNOWN. Extracts title, scope summary, and cross-references. Spawned in parallel by /csp-ingest-docs. Writes a JSON classification file and returns a one-line confirmation.

skills.name: csp-doc-synthesizer
skills.description: Synthesizes classified planning docs into a single consolidated context. Applies precedence rules, detects cross-ref cycles, enforces LOCKED-vs-LOCKED hard-blocks, and writes INGEST-CONFLICTS.md with three buckets (auto-resolved, competing-variants, unresolved-blockers). Spawned by /csp-ingest-docs.

skills.name: csp-doc-verifier
skills.description: Verifies factual claims in generated docs against the live codebase. Returns structured JSON per doc.

skills.name: csp-doc-writer
skills.description: Writes and updates project documentation. Spawned with a doc_assignment block specifying doc type, mode (create/update/supplement), and project context.

skills.name: csp-domain-researcher
skills.description: Researches the business domain and real-world application context of the AI system being built. Surfaces domain expert evaluation criteria, industry-specific failure modes, regulatory context, and what "good" looks like for practitioners in this field — before the eval-planner turns it into measurable rubrics. Spawned by /csp-ai-integration-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-eval-auditor
skills.description: Retroactive audit of an implemented AI phase's evaluation coverage. Checks implementation against the AI-SPEC.md evaluation plan. Scores each eval dimension as COVERED/PARTIAL/MISSING. Produces a scored EVAL-REVIEW.md with findings, gaps, and remediation guidance. Spawned by /csp-eval-review orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-eval-planner
skills.description: Designs a structured evaluation strategy for an AI phase. Identifies critical failure modes, selects eval dimensions with rubrics, recommends tooling, and specifies the reference dataset. Writes the Evaluation Strategy, Guardrails, and Production Monitoring sections of AI-SPEC.md. Spawned by /csp-ai-integration-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-executor
skills.description: Executes CSP plans with atomic commits, deviation handling, checkpoint protocols, and state management. Spawned by execute-phase orchestrator or execute-plan command.

skills.name: csp-framework-selector
skills.description: Presents an interactive decision matrix to surface the right AI/LLM framework for the user's specific use case. Produces a scored recommendation with rationale. Spawned by /csp-ai-integration-phase and /csp-select-framework orchestrators.

skills.name: csp-integration-checker
skills.description: Verifies cross-phase integration and E2E flows. Checks that phases connect properly and user workflows complete end-to-end.

skills.name: csp-intel-updater
skills.description: Analyzes codebase and writes structured intel files to .planning/intel/.

skills.name: csp-nyquist-auditor
skills.description: Fills Nyquist validation gaps by generating tests and verifying coverage for phase requirements

skills.name: csp-pattern-mapper
skills.description: Analyzes codebase for existing patterns and produces PATTERNS.md mapping new files to closest analogs. Read-only codebase analysis spawned by /csp-plan-phase orchestrator before planning.

skills.name: csp-phase-researcher
skills.description: Researches how to implement a phase before planning. Produces RESEARCH.md consumed by csp-planner. Spawned by /csp-plan-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-plan-checker
skills.description: Verifies plans will achieve phase goal before execution. Goal-backward analysis of plan quality. Spawned by /csp-plan-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-planner
skills.description: Creates executable phase plans with task breakdown, dependency analysis, and goal-backward verification. Spawned by /csp-plan-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-project-researcher
skills.description: Researches domain ecosystem before roadmap creation. Produces files in .planning/research/ consumed during roadmap creation. Spawned by /csp-new-project or /csp-new-milestone orchestrators.

skills.name: csp-research-synthesizer
skills.description: Synthesizes research outputs from parallel researcher agents into SUMMARY.md. Spawned by /csp-new-project after 4 researcher agents complete.

skills.name: csp-roadmapper
skills.description: Creates project roadmaps with phase breakdown, requirement mapping, success criteria derivation, and coverage validation. Spawned by /csp-new-project orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-security-auditor
skills.description: Verifies threat mitigations from PLAN.md threat model exist in implemented code. Produces SECURITY.md. Spawned by /csp-secure-phase.

skills.name: csp-ui-auditor
skills.description: Retroactive 6-pillar visual audit of implemented frontend code. Produces scored UI-REVIEW.md. Spawned by /csp-ui-review orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-ui-checker
skills.description: Validates UI-SPEC.md design contracts against 6 quality dimensions. Produces BLOCK/FLAG/PASS verdicts. Spawned by /csp-ui-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-ui-researcher
skills.description: Produces UI-SPEC.md design contract for frontend phases. Reads upstream artifacts, detects design system state, asks only unanswered questions. Spawned by /csp-ui-phase orchestrator.

skills.name: csp-user-profiler
skills.description: Analyzes extracted session messages across 8 behavioral dimensions to produce a scored developer profile with confidence levels and evidence. Spawned by profile orchestration workflows.

skills.name: csp-verifier
skills.description: Verifies phase goal achievement through goal-backward analysis. Checks codebase delivers what phase promised, not just that tasks completed. Creates VERIFICATION.md report.

skills.name: csp-add-backlog
skills.description: Use when capturing an idea or task for later work without disrupting the current milestone's phase sequence

skills.name: csp-add-phase
skills.description: Use when adding a new integer phase to the end of the current milestone in the project roadmap

skills.name: csp-add-tests
skills.description: Use when generating unit and E2E tests for a completed phase based on its implementation and summary artifacts

skills.name: csp-add-todo
skills.description: Use when capturing an idea, task, or issue that surfaces during a session without losing current work context

skills.name: csp-ai-integration-phase
skills.description: Use when a phase involves building AI systems, to generate an AI design contract before planning begins

skills.name: csp-analyze-dependencies
skills.description: Use when analyzing phase dependencies in the roadmap to detect file overlaps and API coupling before parallel execution

skills.name: csp-audit-fix
skills.description: Use when running an autonomous audit-to-fix pipeline that classifies issues, fixes auto-fixable ones, and commits atomically

skills.name: csp-audit-milestone
skills.description: Use when verifying a milestone achieved its definition of done by aggregating phase verifications and checking cross-phase integration

skills.name: csp-audit-uat
skills.description: Use when auditing all outstanding UAT and verification items across phases to produce a prioritized human test plan

skills.name: csp-autonomous
skills.description: Use when driving all remaining milestone phases autonomously through discuss-plan-execute cycles with minimal user intervention

skills.name: csp-check-todos
skills.description: Use when listing pending todos to select one, load its full context, and route to the appropriate next action

skills.name: csp-cleanup
skills.description: Use when archiving accumulated phase directories from completed milestones into versioned milestone archive folders

skills.name: csp-code-review-fix
skills.description: Use when auto-fixing issues identified in a code review by spawning a fixer agent and iterating up to three times

skills.name: csp-code-review
skills.description: Use when reviewing source files changed during a phase for bugs, security issues, and code quality problems

skills.name: csp-complete-milestone
skills.description: Use when marking a shipped version as complete, evolving project docs, reorganizing the roadmap, and tagging the release

skills.name: csp-debug
skills.description: Use when systematically debugging an issue using the scientific method with subagent isolation and persistent state across resets

skills.name: csp-diagnose-issues
skills.description: Use when orchestrating parallel debug agents to investigate UAT gaps and find root causes for each identified gap

skills.name: csp-discovery-phase
skills.description: Use when executing discovery at the appropriate depth level to produce a discovery document that informs plan creation

skills.name: csp-discuss-phase
skills.description: Use when extracting implementation decisions from the user through collaborative thinking-partner discussion before planning a phase

skills.name: csp-discuss-phase-assumptions
skills.description: Use when surfacing assumptions about a phase through codebase-first analysis instead of interview-style questioning

skills.name: csp-discuss-phase-power
skills.description: Use when generating all discussion questions upfront into a JSON state file and HTML companion for asynchronous offline answering

skills.name: csp-do
skills.description: Use when analyzing freeform user text and routing to the most appropriate CSP command without performing the work itself

skills.name: csp-docs-update
skills.description: Use when generating, updating, and verifying all project documentation against the live codebase with parallel doc agents

skills.name: csp-edit-phase
skills.description: Use when editing any field of an existing phase in the roadmap while preserving its number and position in the sequence

skills.name: csp-eval-review
skills.description: Use when auditing an implemented AI phase's evaluation coverage to produce a scored review with gap analysis and remediation plan

skills.name: csp-execute-phase
skills.description: Use when executing all plans in a phase using wave-based parallel subagent orchestration with a lean coordinator

skills.name: csp-execute-plan
skills.description: Use when executing a single PLAN.md prompt and creating the outcome summary SUMMARY.md for a phase

skills.name: csp-explore
skills.description: Use when exploring an idea through Socratic questioning and mid-conversation research before routing outputs to artifacts

skills.name: csp-extract-learnings
skills.description: Use when extracting decisions, lessons, patterns, and surprises from completed phase artifacts into a structured learnings file

skills.name: csp-fast
skills.description: Use when executing a trivial task inline without subagent overhead — understand, do, commit, and log in one pass

skills.name: csp-forensics
skills.description: Use when performing post-mortem investigation of failed or stuck workflows by analyzing git history and planning artifacts

skills.name: csp-graduation
skills.description: Use when clustering recurring learnings across recent phases and surfacing promotion candidates for developer approval

skills.name: csp-health
skills.description: Use when validating the planning directory integrity, reporting actionable issues, and optionally repairing auto-fixable problems

skills.name: csp-help
skills.description: Use when displaying command help and reference content at the requested level of progressive disclosure detail

skills.name: csp-import
skills.description: Use when importing external plans with conflict detection against existing project decisions before writing anything

skills.name: csp-inbox
skills.description: Use when triaging open GitHub issues and PRs against project templates and contribution guidelines with optional actions

skills.name: csp-ingest-docs
skills.description: Use when scanning a repo for planning documents and synthesizing them into a consolidated planning context directory

skills.name: csp-insert-phase
skills.description: Use when inserting an urgent decimal-numbered phase between existing phases without renumbering the entire roadmap

skills.name: csp-list-phase-assumptions
skills.description: Use when surfacing assumptions about a phase before planning so users can correct misconceptions early

skills.name: csp-list-workspaces
skills.description: Use when listing all available CSP workspaces and their current status

skills.name: csp-manager
skills.description: Use when managing a milestone from a single terminal with a visual dashboard and inline or background agent dispatch

skills.name: csp-map-codebase
skills.description: Use when orchestrating parallel agents to analyze the codebase and produce structured documents in the planning directory

skills.name: csp-milestone-summary
skills.description: Use when generating a comprehensive human-friendly project summary from milestone artifacts for team onboarding and review

skills.name: csp-mvp-phase
skills.description: Use when planning a phase as a vertical MVP slice with user story format and SPIDR splitting before delegating to plan-phase

skills.name: csp-new-milestone
skills.description: Use when starting a new milestone cycle by updating project docs, defining requirements, and creating a phased execution plan

skills.name: csp-new-project
skills.description: Use when initializing a new project through deep questioning, optional research, requirements gathering, and roadmap creation

skills.name: csp-new-workspace
skills.description: Use when creating an isolated workspace with git worktrees or clones and an independent planning directory

skills.name: csp-next
skills.description: Use when automatically detecting project state and advancing to the next logical workflow step in the discuss-plan-execute-verify progression

skills.name: csp-node-repair
skills.description: Use when autonomously repairing a failed task verification by proposing and attempting structured fixes before escalating to the user

skills.name: csp-note
skills.description: Use when capturing an idea with zero friction in a single write call without questions, prompts, or subagent overhead

skills.name: csp-pause-work
skills.description: Use when creating structured handoff files to preserve complete work state for resumption in a later session

skills.name: csp-plan-milestone-gaps
skills.description: Use when creating all phases necessary to close gaps identified by the milestone audit in a single command

skills.name: csp-plan-phase
skills.description: Use when creating executable PLAN.md files for a roadmap phase with integrated research and a verification revision loop

skills.name: csp-plan-review-convergence
skills.description: Use when running a cross-AI plan convergence loop that replans with review feedback until no high-severity concerns remain

skills.name: csp-plant-seed
skills.description: Use when capturing a forward-looking idea as a structured seed file that auto-surfaces when trigger conditions match later

skills.name: csp-pr-branch
skills.description: Use when creating a clean PR branch by filtering out transient planning artifacts so reviewers see only meaningful changes

skills.name: csp-profile-user
skills.description: Use when generating a developer behavioral profile through session analysis and creating Claude-discoverable artifacts

skills.name: csp-progress
skills.description: Use when checking project progress, summarizing recent work and what is ahead, then routing to the next appropriate action

skills.name: csp-quick
skills.description: Use when executing small ad-hoc tasks with atomic commits and state tracking, optionally enabling the full quality pipeline with --full

skills.name: csp-reapply-patches
skills.description: Use when reapplying saved local customizations after a CSP update using three-way merge against the newly installed version

skills.name: csp-remove-phase
skills.description: Use when removing an unstarted future phase from the roadmap, deleting its directory, and renumbering subsequent phases

skills.name: csp-remove-workspace
skills.description: Use when removing a workspace by cleaning up git worktrees and deleting the workspace directory

skills.name: csp-resume-project
skills.description: Use when resuming an existing project in a new session by restoring full context from previous planning and work state

skills.name: csp-review
skills.description: Use when requesting cross-AI peer review of phase plans from external AI CLIs to produce combined structured feedback

skills.name: csp-scan
skills.description: Use when running a lightweight single-agent codebase assessment for one focus area producing targeted planning documents

skills.name: csp-secure-phase
skills.description: Use when verifying that threat mitigations from a completed phase are resolved and updating the security documentation

skills.name: csp-session-report
skills.description: Use when generating a post-session summary capturing work performed, outcomes achieved, and estimated resource usage

skills.name: csp-settings-advanced
skills.description: Use when configuring advanced CSP settings like plan bounce, node repair, subagent timeouts, and runtime model tier overrides

skills.name: csp-settings-integrations
skills.description: Use when configuring third-party integrations such as search API keys, code-review CLI routing, and agent-skill injection

skills.name: csp-settings
skills.description: Use when configuring CSP workflow agents and selecting a model profile through an interactive multi-question prompt

skills.name: csp-ship
skills.description: Use when creating a PR from completed work, generating a rich body from planning artifacts, and preparing for merge

skills.name: csp-sketch-wrap-up
skills.description: Use when curating sketch design findings into a persistent project skill for future UI implementation reference

skills.name: csp-sketch
skills.description: Use when exploring design directions through throwaway HTML mockups producing two to three variants for comparison

skills.name: csp-spec-phase
skills.description: Use when clarifying what a phase delivers through Socratic questioning with ambiguity scoring to produce a spec document

skills.name: csp-spike-wrap-up
skills.description: Use when packaging spike experiment findings into a persistent project skill as an implementation blueprint for future builds

skills.name: csp-spike
skills.description: Use when spiking an idea through focused experiments to validate feasibility and produce verified knowledge for the real build

skills.name: csp-stats
skills.description: Use when displaying comprehensive project statistics including phases, plans, requirements, git metrics, and timeline

skills.name: csp-sync-skills
skills.description: Use when syncing managed skill directories across multiple runtime installs to keep them aligned after a CSP update

skills.name: csp-thread
skills.description: Use when creating, listing, closing, or resuming persistent context threads for cross-session project work

skills.name: csp-transition
skills.description: Internal workflow invoked automatically during phase transitions to graduate learnings — not a user-facing command

skills.name: csp-ui-phase
skills.description: Use when generating a UI design contract for frontend phases to lock spacing, typography, color, and design decisions before planning

skills.name: csp-ui-review
skills.description: Use when performing a retroactive six-pillar visual audit of implemented frontend code to produce scored actionable findings

skills.name: csp-ultraplan-phase
skills.description: Use when offloading plan phase to Claude Code's ultraplan cloud infrastructure for browser-based review and import back

skills.name: csp-undo
skills.description: Use when safely reverting phase or plan commits using the phase manifest with dependency checks and git revert without history loss

skills.name: csp-update
skills.description: Use when checking for CSP updates, displaying the changelog for new versions, and executing a clean installation with confirmation

skills.name: csp-validate-phase
skills.description: Use when auditing Nyquist validation gaps for a completed phase and generating missing tests to update validation documentation

skills.name: csp-verify-phase
skills.description: Use when verifying that the codebase delivers what a phase promised through goal-backward analysis rather than task completion checks

skills.name: csp-verify-work
skills.description: Use when validating built features through conversational UAT with persistent state tracking that survives context resets

skills.name: csp-agent-introspection-debugging
skills.description: Structured self-debugging workflow for AI agent failures using capture, diagnosis, contained recovery, and introspection reports.

skills.name: csp-agent-sort
skills.description: Build an evidence-backed CSP install plan for a specific repo by sorting skills, commands, rules, hooks, and extras into DAILY vs LIBRARY buckets using parallel repo-aware review passes. Use when CSP should be trimmed to what a project actually needs instead of loading the full bundle.

skills.name: csp-article-writing
skills.description: Write articles, guides, blog posts, tutorials, newsletter issues, and other long-form content in a distinctive voice derived from supplied examples or brand guidance. Use when the user wants polished written content longer than a paragraph, especially when voice consistency, structure, and credibility matter.

skills.name: csp-autonomous-loops
skills.description: Patterns and architectures for autonomous Claude Code loops — from simple sequential pipelines to RFC-driven multi-agent DAG systems.

skills.name: csp-brand-voice
skills.description: Build a source-derived writing style profile from real posts, essays, launch notes, docs, or site copy, then reuse that profile across content, outreach, and social workflows. Use when the user wants voice consistency without generic AI writing tropes.

skills.name: csp-bun-runtime
skills.description: Bun as runtime, package manager, bundler, and test runner. When to choose Bun vs Node, migration notes, and Vercel support.

skills.name: csp-content-engine
skills.description: Create platform-native content systems for X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, newsletters, and repurposed multi-platform campaigns. Use when the user wants social posts, threads, scripts, content calendars, or one source asset adapted cleanly across platforms.

skills.name: csp-content-hash-cache-pattern
skills.description: Cache expensive file processing results using SHA-256 content hashes — path-independent, auto-invalidating, with service layer separation.

skills.name: csp-cpp-coding-standards
skills.description: C++ coding standards based on the C++ Core Guidelines (isocpp.github.io). Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring C++ code to enforce modern, safe, and idiomatic practices.

skills.name: csp-cpp-testing
skills.description: Use only when writing/updating/fixing C++ tests, configuring GoogleTest/CTest, diagnosing failing or flaky tests, or adding coverage/sanitizers.

skills.name: csp-crosspost
skills.description: Multi-platform content distribution across X, LinkedIn, Threads, and Bluesky. Adapts content per platform using content-engine patterns. Never posts identical content cross-platform. Use when the user wants to distribute content across social platforms.

skills.description: Agent orchestration: available agents, parallel execution, multi-perspective analysis
